step_rationale: HF/MI biomarker directly targeting SOD2; vascular performance regulation.
mechanism: miR-222-3p directly suppresses SOD2 and regulates vascular performance in MI and heart failure.

references.title: Atherosclerotic Conditions Promote the Packaging of Functional MicroRNA-92a-3p Into Endothelial Microvesicles.
MicroRNAs regulating superoxide dismutase 2 are new circulating biomarkers of heart failure.
